channel.title: Frontend on Mwongera Evans
channel.description: Recent content in Frontend on Mwongera Evans

item.title: How to setup a python virtual environment on windows 11
item.description: A virtual environment, or venv, is a Python module that creates a unique environment for each task or project. It installs the necessary packages specific to that setting while neatly organizing your projects. Venv never modifies the system’s default Python versions or system modules. Using it allows a unique working environment to avoid disruptions to other Python variants existing but unrelated to your project. 1. Prerequisites I recommend enabling the Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) to take full advantage of all the functionality of venv on Windows 10.

item.title: Python test
item.description: Since 2019, the raging COVID-19 epidemic has claimed the lives of many people and forced many countries to take measures to blockade and isolate. Exercising at home is becoming a new way to improve people's health and protect them from the Corona virus. Many people responded to the 30-day push-ups challenge with the hashtag #pushupchallenge on social networks as a way to encourage each other to take some physical activities. My team has designed and built a desktop app that can analyze and count the number of pushups.
